allowed_claims: DryingBox AAN package passed consumer Stage1-5 and local Stage4b live smoke.
MuffleFurnace and Beaker_01 replicated AAN consumer intake, manifest check, task-root mount, no-local-repair verification, runtime-adapter preflight, and generic Stage4b live smoke.
MuffleFurnace passed generic AAN Stage4b live smoke with reset/step/render/metric/logging/result_info evidence.
Beaker_01 passed generic AAN Stage4b live smoke with reset/step/render/metric/logging/result_info evidence after standardizing CUROBO_SRC, PATH, and LD_LIBRARY_PATH for the runtime environment.
Stage6 replication acceptance is satisfied for phase-1 rigid/articulated USD consumer workflow.

assets.blocker_or_next_action: Stage4b smoke PASS. Keep semantic evaluator/task-success and material warning closure as follow-ups.
assets.producer_owner_action: not_required_for_stage4a; coordinate semantic evaluator/plugin contract before task-success claims

assets.blocker_or_next_action: Stage4b smoke PASS. Keep semantic evaluator/task-success and OmniGlass material warning closure as follow-ups.
assets.producer_owner_action: not_required_for_stage4b_smoke; coordinate semantic evaluator/plugin contract and material-template closure before stronger claims

blocked_claims: official EBench leaderboard or policy success is proven
generic semantic evaluator dispatch for arbitrary AAN task/evaluator.yaml is implemented
MuffleFurnace or Beaker_01 generic smoke pass equals semantic task success
full visual material parity is proven
blocker_or_next_action: Stage6 replication hardening PASS. Next follow-ups: standardize the AAN runtime env bootstrap, implement semantic evaluator dispatch for task/evaluator.yaml, and close material-warning/full-visual-parity evidence separately.
meaning: Stage6 replication hardening is PASS: two non-DryingBox AAN packages have structured consumer evidence, and both replicated assets (MuffleFurnace and Beaker_01) passed generic Stage4b live smoke with reset/step/render/metric/logging/result_info evidence. Semantic evaluator execution, policy success, and full visual material parity remain separate follow-ups.
notes: MuffleFurnace Stage4b used a generic smoke lane with generation_config.goal=[] and object_config={}; score=0.0 is expected and is not semantic task success.
MuffleFurnace runtime emitted MDL compiler warnings; they do not block Stage4b smoke PASS but block full visual material parity claims.

An earlier no-job probe in the same evidence directory was preserved as no_job_* diagnostic files; the final probe.json and runtime-smoke manifest use the corrected submit path through genmanip_client.cli main([...]).
A first server launch failed because RAY_TMPDIR was too long for Ray AF_UNIX sockets; the final run used /tmp/ray_muf4b.

Beaker_01 Stage4b first failed before asset load because the runtime worker did not inherit CUROBO_SRC; a second fresh run resolved curobo import but exposed missing PATH/LD_LIBRARY_PATH for ninja and libcudart.so.11.0.

Final Beaker_01 Stage4b PASS used the existing embodied-eval-os-sim-isaacsim41-genmanip-py310 env with CUROBO_SRC, PATH=$PYENV/bin:$PATH, and LD_LIBRARY_PATH pointing at IsaacSim omni.cuda.libs/bin and omni.gpu_foundation/bin/deps.
Beaker_01 runtime emitted OmniGlass MDL compiler warnings; they do not block Stage4b smoke PASS but block full visual material parity claims.
Both MuffleFurnace and Beaker_01 Stage4b runs are generic smoke lanes with generation_config.goal=[] and object_config={}; score=0.0 is expected and is not semantic task success.
producer_owner_action: not_required_for_stage4b_smoke; required later for material-template closure or semantic evaluator contract if stronger claims are needed
